title: Vis and Ramin: The Original Tristan and Isolde
description: The Persian love epic that predates and likely influenced the Tristan legend — a queen trapped between her husband and her lover.
introduction: The Persian love epic that predates and likely influenced the Tristan legend — a queen trapped between her husband and her lover.

translation.text: Vis said: 'My heart is not my own. It belongs to Ramin. What can I do? Love is not a choice. It is a fire that burns whether you will it or not.'
